what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links an attachment identifier to a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter with an id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp.
target is a board URI: board://item-3465c15a.
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone offset.
No body content or code symbols are present.
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme pointing to item-3465c15a.
The attachment_type groups this record under board_items.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Identifier prefixes follow a pattern: att- for attachments and item- for board items.
References external entities with a URI-style target.
concerns: The referenced board item content is not included, so the file is not self-explanatory.
notes: A lightweight metadata stub that records when an attachment was linked to a specific board item in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: Who added this attachment and why?
Is this attachment still active or has it been superseded?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file records an attachment pointing to a board item, which is consistent with its metadata fields.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create and preserve a durable reference from a channel attachment to a specific board item, likely for retrieval or audit.
contribution: Preserves the specific attachment-to-board-item linkage and its creation timestamp within the dragnet-development channel.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML metadata attachment record in the dragnet-development channel of type board_items, linking att-00f9a7d3 to board://item-3465c15a and recording an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to record that a channel attachment references a particular board item.
